channel.title: 2021 on HRLB Lab
channel.description: Recent content in 2021 on HRLB Lab

item.title: Circle Representation for Medical Object Detection
item.description:
Ethan H. Nguyen, Haichun Yang, Ruining Deng,Yuzhe Lu, Zheyu Zhu, Joseph T. Roland, Le Lu, BennettA. Landman, Agnes B. Fogo, Yuankai Huo
IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (2021)

item.title: Faster Mean-shift: GPU-accelerated Embedding-clustering for Cell Segmentation and Tracking
item.description:
Mengyang Zhao, Aadarsh Jha, Quan Liu, Bryan A. Millis, Anita Mahadevan-Jansen, Le Lu, Bennett A. Landman, Matthew J.Tyskac, Yuankai Huo
Medical Image Analysis (2021)

item.title: Map3D: Registration Based Multi-Object Tracking on 3D Serial Whole Slide Images
item.description:
Ruining Deng, Haichun Yang, Aadarsh Jha, Yuzhe Lu, Peng Chu, Agnes Fogo, Yuankai Huo
IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (2021)

item.title: SimTriplet: Simple Triplet Representation Learning with a Single GPU
item.description:
Quan Liu, Peter C. Louis, Yuzhe Lu, Aadarsh Jha, Mengyang Zhao, Ruining Deng, Tianyuan Yao, Joseph T. Roland, Haichun Yang, Shilin Zhao, Lee E. Wheless, Yuankai Huo
MICCAI (2021)

item.title: Pancreas CT Segmentation by Predictive Phenotyping
item.description:
Yucheng Tang, Riqiang Gao, Ho Hin Lee, Qi Yang, Xin Yu, Yuyin Zhou, Shunxing Bao, Yuankai Huo, Jeffrey Spraggins, Jack Virostko, Zhoubing Xu, Bennet A. Landman
MICCAI (2021)

item.title: Lung Cancer Risk Estimation with Incomplete Data: A Joint Missing Imputation Perspective
item.description:
Riqiang Gao, Yucheng Tang, Kaiwen Xu, Ho Hin Lee, Steve A. Deppen, Kim L. Sandler, Pierre P. Massion, Thomas A. Lasko, Yuankai Huo, Bennett A. Landman
MICCAI (2021)

item.title: From Brain to Body: Learning Low-Frequency Respiration and Cardiac Signals from fMRI Dynamics
item.description:
Roza Bayrak, Colin Hansen, Nafis Ahmed, Ilwoo Lyu, Yuankai Huo, Catie Chang
MICCAI (2021)

item.title: AI Applications in Renal Pathology
item.description:
Yuankai Huo, Ruining Deng, Quan Liu, Agnes B. Fogo, Haichun Yang
Kidney International (2021)

item.title: ASIST: Annotation-free Synthetic Instance Segmentation and Tracking by Adversarial Simulations
item.description:
Quan Liu, Isabella M. Gaeta, Mengyang Zhao, Ruining Deng; Aadarsh Jha, Bryan A. Millis, Anita Mahadevan-Jansen, Matthew J. Tyska, Yuankai Huo
Computers in Biology and Medicine (2021)

item.title: BEDs: Bagging Ensemble Deep Segmentation for Nucleus Segmentation with Testing Stage Stain Augmentation
item.description:
Xing Li, Haichun Yang, Jiaxin He, Aadarsh Jha, Agnes B. Fogo, Lee E. Wheless, Shilin Zhao, Yuankai Huo
ISBI (2021)

item.title: Compound Figure Separation of Biomedical Images with Side Loss
item.description:
Tianyuan Yao, Chang Qu, Quan Liu, Ruining Deng, Yuanhan Tian, Jiachen Xu, Aadarsh Jha, Shunxing Bao, Mengyang Zhao, Agnes B Fogo, Bennett A Landman, Catie Chang, Haichun Yang, Yuankai Huo
DALI (2021)

item.title: VoxelEmbed: 3D Instance Segmentation and Tracking with Voxel Embedding based Deep Learning
item.description:
Mengyang Zhao, Quan Liu, Aadarsh Jha, Ruining Deng, Tianyuan Yao, Anita Mahadevan-Jansen, Matthew J.Tyska, Bryan A. Millis, Yuankai Huo
MLMI (2021)

item.title: CaCL: Class-aware Codebook Learning for Weakly Supervised Segmentation on Diffuse Image Patterns
item.description:
Ruining Deng, Quan Liu, Shunxing Bao, Aadarsh Jha, Catie Chang, Bryan A Millis, Matthew J Tyska, Yuankai Huo

item.title: Random Multi-Channel Image Synthesis for Multiplexed Immunofluorescence Imaging
item.description:
Shunxing Bao, Yucheng Tang, Ho Hin Lee, Riqiang Gao, Sophie Chiron, Ilwoo Lyu, Lori A. Coburn, Keith T. Wilson, Joseph T. Roland, Bennett A. Landman, Yuankai Huo
COMPAY (2021)

item.title: A Limitation of Acyclic Oriented Graphs Matching as Cell Tracking Accuracy Measure when Evaluating Mitosis
GAN based Unsupervised Segmentation: Should We Match the Exact Number of Objects
item.description:
Quan Liu, Isabella M. Gaeta, Bryan A. Millis, Matthew J. Tyska, Yuankai Huo
SPIE (2021)

item.title: Improve Global Glomerulosclerosis Classification with Imbalanced Data using CircleMix Augmentation
item.description:
Yuzhe Lu, Haichun Yang, Zheyu Zhu, Ruining Deng, Agnes B. Fogo, Yuankai Huo
SPIE (2021)

item.title: Measure Partial Liver Volumetric Variations from Paired Inspiratory-expiratory Chest CT Scans
item.description:
Can Luo, James G. Terry, Yucheng Tang, Kaiwen Xu, Pierre P. Massion, Bennett A. Landman, J. Jeffery Carr, Yuankai Huo
